description: Composition Blue round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with graphic and flock print on the front Wash care Machine wash warm inside out with like colours using a mild detergent Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations Fit Comfort Specially designed for the perfect you, this mr. men T-shirt is a great gift for the masters of perfection. Treat yourself or a friend to this stylishly comfortable T-shirt in blue, made of pure cotton fabric, this tee wicks away sweat and keeps you comfortable and dry. Pair it with jeans or chinos and comfortable casual shoes or sandals. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 6' and shoulders 18"
